productDisplayName: Lotto Women Blue Disco Holic Flip Flop
description: Style Note A flip flop that balances a vacay vibe and street cool, you can wear this lotto pair with casual clothes and at home! Product Details Blue thong style textured fabric straps with branding appliqued and a fabric toe separator Blue, green and white printed soft footbed with branding embossed on the heel  Durable rubber outsole with ergonomically styled grooves and branded lugs for absolute grip and traction Material and Care Rubber Wipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust
